jobs.description: About KFC. KFC was founded by Colonel Sanders with a passion for great-tasting chicken. We are committed to delivering the best chicken experience to our customers every day.
About Shopify. Shopify is a leading e-commerce platform that empowers entrepreneurs around the world to build and grow their businesses online with ease.
About Tim Hortons. Tim Hortons is a Canadian icon, known for its coffee and community spirit. We are looking for passionate marketers to help spread our brand values.
About RBC. Royal Bank of Canada is one of the largest financial institutions in North America. We are looking for data-driven individuals to help shape our future.
About Wealthsimple. Wealthsimple is a fintech company making investing simple and accessible for everyone. We design products that help Canadians grow their money.
About Telus. Telus is a leading Canadian telecommunications company committed to connecting Canadians to what matters most. Join our friendly support team today.
About Hootsuite. Hootsuite is the world's most widely used social media management platform. We help organizations build their brands and grow their businesses.
About Freshbooks. Freshbooks is a cloud-based accounting software company serving small business owners. We are passionate about building tools that make work easier.
About Lululemon. Lululemon is a global athletic apparel brand rooted in yoga and mindful movement. We are looking for creative designers to bring our brand to life.
About Cohere. Cohere is an AI company building natural language processing tools for businesses. We are at the forefront of making AI accessible to developers everywhere.
About Scotiabank. Scotiabank is one of Canada's big five banks, committed to helping employees and customers achieve their financial goals. Join our growing HR team.
About Lightspeed. Lightspeed is a cloud-based commerce platform powering retail and restaurant businesses worldwide. We build fast, intuitive, and beautiful software.
About Amazon. Amazon is a global leader in e-commerce and cloud computing. We are obsessed with the customer experience and driven by a culture of innovation and speed.
About Hootsuite. Hootsuite is on a mission to help people build stronger connections online. We are looking for talented writers who can create compelling content strategies.
